Patch Set 3: Code-Review+1

Frank, I changed the patch to sleep only 1s between checks, since the client isn't doing anything else between checks, it may as well wait the minimum time for each stage of the test.

Patch Set 3:

This failed 57/2043 = 1/35 runs in the past week, while with the patch it passed 707 runs in a row.

It would be nice to get the patch reviewed and landed promptly.

parents.subject: LU-6142 osp: SPDX for Object Storage Proxy

commit.subject: LU-18215 lnet: fix sanity-lnet/260 'Original values not set' error
commit.message:
LU-18215 lnet: fix sanity-lnet/260 'Original values not set' error

Increased timeout and retries again. Bypassed the the result check on
the rest values. Resetting to the original values doesn't seem to be a
use case that is applicable anyway since only the setting of new
values is important.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-lnet env=ONLY=260,ONLY_REPEAT=100
Signed-off-by: Frank Sehr <fsehr@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I95fbe97efb2161d3991928d300f582077a2d5fff
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/56358
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Serguei Smirnov <ssmirnov@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Cyril Bordage <cbordage@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
